data.title: New Copilot Pro and Pro+ subscriptions halted by GitHub due to overwhelming AI demand, leading to tighter usage limits and Opus model removal.
data.description: GitHub has paused the enrollment of new Copilot Pro and Pro+ subscriptions due to the increasing demand for agentic AI workloads that are putting a strain on their capacity. The platform has also implemented stricter usage limits and eliminated Opus models from lower-priced tiers. These changes come as GitHub works to manage its resources effectively.

data.title: Warsh to defend central bank's independence in Senate hearing amid criminal probe delaying his appointment as next chair.
data.description: Kevin M. Warsh is scheduled to appear before the Senate Banking Committee on Tuesday. However, a criminal probe into the central bank could potentially hinder him from assuming the position of the next chair.

data.title: Back-to-Back Shutdowns Expose Readiness Risks Across Coast Guard Workforce
data.description: A recent report from Coast Guard Mutual Assistance (CGMA) indicates that the Coast Guard workforce is facing significant financial readiness challenges following two consecutive government shutdowns. This highlights the urgent need to address financial preparedness within the service. The data reveals the extent of the issues faced by personnel during these shutdowns and underscores the importance of providing support to ensure the financial stability of Coast Guard members. The findings point to a pressing need for action to address these challenges and safeguard the financial well-being of those serving in the Coast Guard.

data.title: New Affordable Apartments in Austin, Texas, Helped by $2M Grant From FHLB Dallas and Bank OZK
data.description: Residents of Austin, Texas, now have access to new affordable housing options with the help of a $2 million grant from the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) facilitated through Bank OZK. The grand opening of The Roz, a community comprising 100 affordable apartments in South Austin, was celebrated by the banks, along with the Austin Housing Finance Corp. The development of this $24.3 million complex, led by Austin Housing Finance Corp. and SGI Ventures, is geared towards serving individuals earning between 30 to 60 percent of the area's median income.

data.title: Europe’s Largest dedicated Google First Partner Rebrands to Beyond, Redefining a ‘New Era’ in Accelerated AI-Driven Cloud Transformations
data.description: Following 18 months of rapid growth, including several acquisitions, Beyond has officially launched a complete rebranding initiative to solidify its presence across the UK, Europe, and North America. The company's widespread expansion has significantly increased its reach and influence in the industry.

data.title: Inspira Completes Commercial Deployment of its AME System at a Tier-1 U.S. Defense Entity
data.description: In Ra'anana, Israel, on April 16, 2026, Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd. shared that they have triumphantly provided and had an Additively Manufactured Electronics ("AME") system accepted by a top U.S. defense customer at their location under a commercial agreement. This noteworthy achievement by Inspira™ signifies a significant step forward in their collaboration with key players in the defense sector. The Company's stock under the symbol Nasdaq: IINN has likely seen a positive response following this development.

data.title: ENvue Issues Stockholder Letter & Provides Corporate Update
data.description: Located in Tyler, Texas, on April 16, 2026, ENvue Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: FEED) released a stockholder letter and corporate update. The company focuses on medical technology, specifically developing non-invasive solutions for enteral care in clinical and home care environments.

data.title: FLYTE EMERGES AS DIRECT BENEFICIARY AS RISING FUEL COSTS DRIVE AIRLINE RETREAT FROM SHORT-HAUL ROUTES
data.description: Leading airlines are quickly reducing their flight routes as economic conditions deteriorate, opening up a lucrative opportunity in regional air travel worth billions of dollars. The move comes as carriers grapple with declining profitability in the industry.

data.title: Talent agency formerly known as Wasserman and now named The Team is attracting buyers after founder's emails appeared in Epstein documents.
data.description: The agency formerly known as Wasserman, now rebranded as The Team, is up for sale following the discovery of its founder's emails in the Epstein files.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Warns Iran As Strait Of Hormuz Blockade Begins; Broadcom, Bloom, Sandisk Are Big Winners
data.description: In recent updates on the market, Dow Jones Futures experienced a surge following President Trump's caution to Iran regarding the U.S. blockade at the vital Strait of Hormuz. Sandisk notably reached record-breaking heights amidst this news. Noteworthy winners alongside Sandisk in this development included Broadcom and Bloom. This development marks an important shift in the market landscape.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Pops As Trump Says This On Iran; Cathie Wood Loads Up On Palantir Shares (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase in the stock market following remarks made by President Trump about Iran. Oracle's stock saw a significant rise, while Palantir also experienced gains after investor Cathie Wood purchased shares in the company. This information was covered in a live broadcast, focusing on the stock market trends for the day.

data.title: Bessent Defends Trump's Iran War Move Saying US Economy Was In 'Good Shape'— But Warns Growth May Be Slower This Quarter
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent recently suggested that the economic growth for the current quarter may be slower due to the U.S.-Iran conflict. Speaking with CNBC's Sara Eisen, Bessent highlighted the strong economy prior to the conflict and mentioned that President Donald Trump's decision to go to war was influenced by positive economic indicators. Bessent relied on "micro data points" from companies and banks to analyze the economy instead of making precise GDP forecasts. He referenced JP Morgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon's remarks on consumer credit and noted corporate earnings as signals that both consumers and businesses are still resilient. Bessent mentioned that predicting GDP would depend on the length of the conflict, which is currently uncertain. He mentioned, "I don't know whether it's three days or three weeks."
